job.name: monitor
job.description: Deep health check with Pushover alerting. Hits /api/health and evaluates all subsystems: Ecowitt data flow, Kasa connectivity, engine state, moisture levels, and last watering time. Sends a Pushover alert on critical status (with cooldown to avoid spam). Exit codes: 0=healthy, 1=degraded, 2=critical.

errorhandler.script: #!/bin/sh # Dead-man's-switch: if monitor fails (SSH broken, container down), # alert directly from the Rundeck node via curl. TOKEN=$(rd keys get -p keys/pushover/app_token 2>/dev/null) USER_KEY=$(rd keys get -p keys/pushover/user_key 2>/dev/null) if [ -n "$TOKEN" ] && [ -n "$USER_KEY" ]; then curl -sf --max-time 10 \ -d "token=$TOKEN" \ -d "user=$USER_KEY" \ -d "title=Irrigation MONITOR FAILED" \ -d "message=The ops/monitor job failed — the irrigation container may be unreachable." \ -d "priority=1" \ -d "sound=siren" \ https://api.pushover.net/1/messages.json fi
